title: End Compass
description: The mod adds a special compass in Minecraft that points to the nearest End Gateway instead of spinning randomly in the End. This helps players navigate the dimension more easily while still keeping exploration relevant.
body:
# End Compass

Exploring the End to find an End Gateway can get annoying pretty fast.

**End Compass** adds a simple compass that points to the nearest End Gateway, so you don’t have to randomly bridge across islands anymore.

It doesn’t change progression.  
It doesn’t add overpowered mechanics.  
It just makes End exploration less frustrating.


## 🔧 Crafting Recipe

To craft the End Compass, you’ll need:

- 4× Popped Chorus Fruit  
- 1× Compass  
- 4× End Stone Bricks  

Once crafted, it will point to the nearest End Gateway — but **only while you're in the End**.

## 💡 Why I made this

After spending way too long searching for gateways in survival, I wanted something that keeps the exploration aspect but removes the tedious part.  

This mod is designed to feel vanilla-friendly — like something that could naturally exist in the game.

Lightweight. Simple. No config required.
